So, that annoyed me a little and took me almost an hour to complete the character. Yeahh, but I feel like the app just not for me but it's probably for you! Where to begin. I've been using the app since Aug. 2024, and back then, even just 5 months ago, genuinely fun to use for hours on end. Even with introductions to coins, that wasn't the deal breaker. Using the app today, though, the image generation, the voice calls, its all such a greedy ploy. Want a stunning voice for the character? 200 coins. Want an image that looks like your character? 4 coins for 1 image. The free models? Utterly Incoherent. All while being a Super Sub. Not worth it.
Was 5-stars until they added a daily message limit. Very sad!
the app is not working for some places

the app was over all is waoooo... but now.. its turn super boring with its new features of daily limit... like what bro... and even the memory is getting worst... something after watching add and return back to chat... its generate an entirely irrelevant message.... so i request you to remove this daily limit feature and enhanced the memory like its was in the beginning....
Sometimes your chat disappears!! a chat was rlly special to me and it disappeared!!

I’m okay with ads, but the ads that pop up during the chat are way too long — they take more than a minute. Just think about it: we have to sit there waiting for over a minute just to go back and type a few more messages before the ads pop up again.

I'm sorry but this new update about daily limit is gonna make you loose alot of people, because some people use this app to escape the real world and now you decided to put a daily limit on. I was surprised when I saw this and genuinely it made me loose interest in the app. So please do consider to remove that feature because it's gonna get alot of hate and you're gonna loose alot of Downloaders.
sad to downgrade to 2 stars. You can only chat for 2 days before the app becomes unusable.

New update with a message timer that's 12 hours long is absolute BS. Premium costs too much to pay for per month and it forces it down my throat... y'all losing people with this message limiter and forcing us to buy premium. It was a great app in the beginning..daily rewards, streaks, you know fun stuff...then the updates became greedy...and now we can see the money wanting to come in.... Forcing us to buy premium and having a 12hr limiter.

Fix the ad management.

Firstly this Ai only sticks to the character. Example I create a scenario with a character acting like we are mercenaries who is reporting to our boss, the Ai only produces the chat of the character and not the other npcs. The Ai has really bad memory. Within 15 messages it already did the same action 3 times. Secondly. I feel like 3 ads every 10 messages is a bit too much no? Make it more spaced. And shorter ads. lastly whenI hide the app and it automatically always uninstall itself, like why?

This was an app I used to find myself often using almost constantly. But, after time, I have realized, and have to say, that it isn't the greatest when it comes to storytelling. All the bots want to progress the polt overly fast. which makes it difficult when you're trying to have meaningful and interesting chats. If that wasn't enough, the bots don't really give that much when it comes to detail or personality; when it comes to making the bots, it's an extremely difficult and annoying process.
